[@microsoft/fast-element/extensions/attribute-map.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [attributeMap](../fast-element.attributemap/index.html)

## attributeMap() function

Creates a FAST element extension that enables schema-driven attribute mapping for the resolved definition. When called without arguments, uses the default attribute-mapping behavior. The extension uses `definition.schema` when one is provided, or the schema generated by `declarativeTemplate()`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function attributeMap(config?: AttributeMapConfig): FASTElementExtension;
```
